ModMetaData.name: AIRDOCK
ModMetaData.author: DRILLED_HEAD
ModMetaData.description:
You can stock or take out SRTs planes. Of course, you can also open and close the roof. I named it AR roof. and that it doesn't overlap with my another mod, so please modify it or use it as it is.
1. You can stock or take out the plane. 2. Up to 5 planes can be stocked. 3. If some Airbird on the AirDock, you can't take out another one. 4. Where AirDock is located, that Room named AirDock Room. 5. You can control the direction for stocked one 6. Multi-selection is possible. 7. Please build some building after making AirDock. If installed on top of a building, the existing building will be destroyed. So, please set up the AirDock and then put the plane down.
extra content(workable) - SRTS Expanded --Battlestar Galactica - RimHeli has been added - [ELIF] SRTS - Helicopters - Halo UNSC SRTS - Mando SRTS - Morphs Assorted: Dropship SRTS - RimHeli - SRTS Expanded - Battlestar Galactica - Vehicles - and ETC.....
